note: Per-field fill-value guidance (value type, required-ness, choice-group conditionals). Derived offline from schema/mapping/constraints; consistent with the fill engine. Not legal advice — verify against the official form before filing. Currency/time guidance is conservative because the printed '$'/AM-PM are not read here.
